subject: Handle less than /16 oam network
commit_message:
Handle less than /16 oam network

Matching changes in testsuite and demo

Issue-ID: INT-1527
Change-Id: Iac7cdb735c4544e0d6bc79c444ba9de32b79fc32
Signed-off-by: Brian Freeman <bf1936@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 16 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This change should be merged before the testsuite changes that reference this variable
